About the job
Position: Frontend Developer
Type: Contract, Part time
Compensation: $20 - $70/hour
Location: Remote
Commitment: 10-40 hrs/week

Role Responsibilities
Architect, develop, and maintain scalable web interfaces using JavaScript and TypeScript.
Collaborate closely with designers, product managers, and backend engineers to deliver high-quality solutions.
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
Implement best practices in frontend engineering, conduct code reviews, and support continuous integration.
Translate complex requirements into clean, efficient, and reusable code components.
Troubleshoot, debug, and enhance existing applications for optimal performance and user satisfaction.

Requirements
Have expert-level proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript with hands-on experience in modern frontend frameworks.
Demonstrate a track record of delivering high-quality, production-ready web applications.
Possess a strong ability to write clear and maintainable code, adhering to industry standards.
Have exceptional written and verbal communication skills, fostering effective remote collaboration.
Be able to work autonomously while staying closely aligned with broader team goals.

About the Company
Inception, a G42 company, is the region’s leading innovator of AI-powered domain-specific as well as industry-agnostic products, built on a rich heritage of research and development. About the Role
The Mobile Engineer (iOS) at Inception will be responsible for designing and building high-quality, secure, and scalable mobile applications. The role focuses on developing advanced iOS solutions, integrating APIs, and leveraging CoreML capabilities to deliver intelligent, user-centric mobile experiences.

This role is a full-time position based in India (remote).

Responsibilities
Design and develop high-performance iOS applications using Swift
Integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services
Implement CoreML models into mobile applications
Ensure mobile security best practices are followed
Optimize application performance and scalability
Collaborate with cross-functional teams
Write clean, maintainable code
Troubleshoot and debug issues


Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field
Strong experience in iOS development using Swift
Proven experience working with CoreML and integrating machine learning models
Solid understanding of API integration and mobile architecture patterns
Experience with mobile security practices and secure coding standards
Familiarity with version control tools (e.g., Git)
Experience with performance optimization and debugging tools
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills


The successful candidate will be engaged via an external workforce partner in line with Inception’s operating model in the region.

About the job
Termgrid is rewriting the rules of private capital markets. We built the category-defining operating system for deal professionals — the platform where the world's most sophisticated private equity sponsors, lenders, and advisors manage every stage of their financing workflows.

Founded in 2019 by Dipish Rai (Harvard MBA, IIT, Columbia; ex-Providence Equity) and Vishal Singh (Columbia MS CS; ex-CTO Link3D, acquired by Nasdaq: MTLS), Termgrid has achieved what few fintech companies dream of: 4 of the top 5 global private equity firms trust us as their core technology partner. 1600+ institutions. 30,000+ professionals.

We've been named New Solution Provider of the Year at the PE Wire US Awards 2024, Secure Workflow Management Provider of the Year at the PE Wire US Awards 2025, and shortlisted for the PE Wire EU Awards 2026 and The Drawdown Awards 2025. This isn't a company finding its footing — this is a rocket that has already cleared the launchpad.

The $1.7 trillion private credit market is growing at breakneck speed. Every billion-dollar deal, every GP-LP relationship, every leveraged buyout in the pipeline is moving through workflows that were built for a different era. Termgrid is the platform that changes all of that — and we're just getting started.

About The Role
We are looking for a powerhouse Frontend Engineer who views the browser as a high-performance application platform. You won’t just be building components; you’ll be architecting the interface of modern finance. You’ll sit at the intersection of sophisticated UI patterns and robust security, ensuring our platform is as resilient as it is intuitive.

What You’ll Do

Architect & Scale: Build and maintain high-performance, reusable React components using TypeScript
Bridge the Stack: Collaborate closely with the backend team to design seamless API contracts and data flows
Secure the Frontier: Implement best-in-class web security practices (OWASP, CSP, XSS prevention) to protect sensitive financial data
Optimize: Turn complex data sets into fluid, responsive user experiences with a focus on state management and rendering efficiency
Lead Quality: Drive frontend excellence through code reviews, testing, and modern CSS/HTML standards



What We’re Looking For

Core Mastery: Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and Modern JavaScript (ES6+)
Web Fundamentals: Expert-level knowledge of CSS, HTML5, and core browser APIs
Security Mindset: A strong understanding of web security protocols and performance optimization
Collaborative Spirit: Experience working alongside backend engineers to ship complex features from end-to-end
Product Instinct: You care about the why behind the code, not just the how
Remote-friendly flexibility with a high-performance, async-first culture
Work from home set up

About the job
The Role:
We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated Interactive Ads Developer to join our creative engineering team. In this role, you will be responsible for the end-to-end implementation of playable ad experiences, specifically focusing on our card game portfolio. You will own the development process from initial logic implementation to final optimization, ensuring our ads are lightweight, engaging, and performant across all mobile ad networks. This is a hands-on role for a developer with a deep understanding of game mechanics who can translate complex card game play into bite-sized, interactive experiences. This is an hourly, part-time position with a limit of 20 hours per week.

Key Responsibilities:
Architect and develop high-performance, interactive playable ads using HTML5, JavaScript/TypeScript, and various game frameworks.
Take full ownership of project implementation, ensuring card game logic (shuffling, dealing, scoring, and UI/UX) is accurately and efficiently represented.
Write clean, efficient, and modular code optimized for ultra-low file sizes and fast load times.
Collaborate with creative designers and motion artists to translate visual storyboards into functional interactive prototypes.
Troubleshoot and resolve cross-browser compatibility issues and performance bottlenecks in mobile in-app environments.
Execute on project goals independently, managing timelines for multiple concurrent interactive projects.
Conduct thorough testing and debugging across various devices and ad network environments (e.g., AppLovin, IronSource, Unity Ads).

Required Skills and Qualifications:
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Game Development, or a related technical field.
3+ years of professional experience in frontend or game development.
Deep expertise in JavaScript OR TypeScript.
Familiarity with CSS animations and effects
Proven experience with web-based game engines
Good understanding of card game mechanics and the logic required to build deck-based systems.
Expertise in responsive web design and optimizing assets for mobile web performance.
Strong proficiency with version control systems, especially Git.
Experience with asset optimization (texture packing, audio compression) to meet strict file size constraints (e.g., < 5MB).

About the job
Role: Full-Stack Software Engineer (Remote)
Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere)
Payout: $30 - $90/hour

Role Overview:
We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer to work on a contract basis. In this role, you will apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems by contributing to the development of robust web applications that shape how models learn, reason, and perform. Your work will directly impact how AI systems are trained and evaluated across domains like finance, healthcare, and engineering. This is a unique opportunity to leverage your full-stack development skills in a cutting-edge AI-driven platform where real-world expertise bridges the gap between human intelligence and machine learning.

Key Responsibilities:
• Lead the end-to-end design, development, and deployment of scalable, maintainable, and secure web applications using React and Node.js.
• Define and implement system architectures that meet performance, reliability, and security requirements for high-volume AI training environments.
• Mentor and support fellow engineers through technical guidance, code reviews, and best practice enforcement.
• Collaborate with product and design teams to deliver seamless, high-quality user experiences aligned with AI training workflows.
• Identify and resolve technical challenges to continuously improve application performance, scalability, and reliability.

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Proficiency in React and JavaScript for developing dynamic, responsive user interfaces in production-grade web applications.
• Strong expertise in Node.js and either Python or Node.js backend development for building scalable server-side systems.
• Experience with end-to-end system architecture design, including API development, database integration, and cloud deployment.
• Demonstrated ability to write clean, well-documented, and maintainable code with a focus on performance and security.
• Proven track record of mentoring engineers, conducting code reviews, and enforcing coding standards and testing protocols.

More About the Opportunity:
This role offers the chance to work with a global leader in AI-driven platform development, contributing to systems that power over 1 million AI-led interactions and support the training of frontier AI models. You will be part of a rapidly growing network of experts enabling meaningful work through technology and innovation in a funded, high-impact environment.

Equal Opportunity Employer:
We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.

Apply Now!

About the job
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Software Engineer: Frontend in India.

You will join a fast-moving environment building AI-powered communication tools that redefine how businesses interact with their customers. The role focuses on crafting rich, intuitive user interfaces that power complex workflows across messaging, automation, and analytics. You will work closely with backend and product teams to translate ideas into scalable frontend architecture. The environment is highly collaborative, remote-first, and emphasizes ownership, autonomy, and strong communication. You will contribute across the full product lifecycle, from early design discussions to production monitoring and iteration. This is a high-impact engineering role where your work directly shapes user experience and product adoption.

Accountabilities

Design and build responsive, high-performance frontend interfaces that support complex, data-driven workflows across web and mobile platforms.
Translate product requirements into technical implementation plans, including writing Engineering Requirement Documents and breaking down features into actionable tasks.
Develop and maintain robust unit and end-to-end test suites to ensure product stability, reliability, and scalability.
Integrate product analytics and tracking to measure feature performance and user engagement, using insights to drive iteration.
Collaborate closely with backend engineers, designers, and product stakeholders to deliver cohesive and scalable solutions.
Participate in system design discussions and contribute to frontend architecture decisions, ensuring long-term maintainability.
Support the continuous improvement of development processes, tooling, and engineering best practices.

Requirements

Strong experience in frontend engineering, with deep knowledge of modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks such as React (React Native experience is a plus).
Solid understanding of frontend architecture, state management, and building interactive, data-intensive applications.
Experience building and maintaining test suites (unit, integration, and end-to-end testing).
Familiarity with product analytics tools and data-driven feature evaluation.
Ability to document technical requirements clearly and translate product ideas into structured engineering tasks.
Strong communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively in asynchronous, distributed teams.
Experience working across the full product lifecycle in a startup or fast-paced engineering environment.
Fluency in written English is required; spoken English proficiency is strongly preferred.

Benefits

Competitive salary ranging from $60K-$80K per year, based on experience and location.
Fully remote, globally distributed work environment.
Opportunity to work on high-impact, AI-driven products with significant ownership from day one.
Direct collaboration with experienced founders and engineers from high-growth companies.
Paid, structured work trial to ensure mutual fit before long-term commitment.
Flexible, asynchronous work culture designed for global teams.
High autonomy and responsibility in shaping frontend systems and product direction.

How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

About the job
About the company: 

Cradlewise is a baby tech startup based out of San Francisco, Bangalore and Pune. We build smart baby products.

Our first product is a smart crib for babies from 0 to 24 months of age.
Cradlewise smart crib comes with an integrated baby monitor that senses early signs of wakeup, learns from the baby’s sleep patterns and starts rocking along with music to soothe the baby back to sleep - just like a mom!

We are all about sensing, learning and impacting the outcome for the baby and parents.
See how it works here.

We are working to reimagine the baby nursery to make it smart, intuitive and delightful. We’re passionate about our people, our customers, our values, and our culture!

Position Summary:
We are looking for a Senior iOS Developer with strong native iOS expertise and a willingness to do full-stack development. We expect system architecture, cross-platform app development, backend integrations, cloud connectivity, and scalable product development.
You will work closely with product, design, cloud, firmware, and backend teams to build seamless connected experiences across mobile, cloud, and smart devices.
You'll be improving & responsible for:
Designing, developing high-quality native iOS applications using Swift, SwiftUI, and UIKit. You will also need to guide other full-stack developers on iOS app development.
Designing and developing high-quality native Android applications using Kotlin… Yes you read that right… You will own both Android and iOS development for each feature on the app.
Building scalable, maintainable, and high-performance mobile experiences.
Collaborating across teams to architect App ↔ Cloud ↔ Device interactions.
Working on backend integrations, APIs, cloud communication, and connected device experiences as needed for the app experience..
Developing and maintaining reusable UI components aligned with Apple design guidelines.
Supporting full-stack initiatives including API understanding, backend workflows, and cloud infrastructure interactions.
Working on local and remote video streaming features.
Ensuring app reliability, performance, scalability, and maintainability.
Participating in architecture discussions, technical reviews, and product planning.
Mentoring junior developers and contributing to engineering best practices.

What you’ll bring to the role:
Strong systems and product thinking mindset beyond app development.
6–10 years of experience in native iOS development.
Strong expertise in Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, Xcode, Core Data, Instruments, and related native frameworks/tools.
Understanding of backend systems, REST APIs, cloud integrations, and full-stack architecture concepts.
Experience with software design and architectural patterns such as MVVM, MVP, and SOLID principles.
Experience integrating applications with networking APIs and cloud services.
Familiarity with AWS services such as Lambda, S3, SNS, SQS, or equivalent cloud platforms.
Strong debugging, troubleshooting, and performance optimization skills.
Experience with version control systems such as Git.
Familiarity with Agile methodologies and tools such as Jira and Confluence.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills..

The nice to haves:
Experience with Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) integrations on iOS.
Working knowledge of MQTT protocol for real-time device-to-cloud communication.
Experience implementing real-time communication using WebRTC.
Exposure to backend technologies/frameworks such as Node.js, Django, Spring Boot, or similar.
Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or equivalent.
Experience integrating web content within iOS applications using WebViews or hybrid approaches.
Exposure to build automation and release management.

Academic qualifications
Bachelor/Masters Degree in Engineering/Computer Science

What We Offer:
Flexible Working Days
Results oriented work environment.
Fast professional growth: significant responsibility for your project.
Opportunity to apply in practice and rapidly grow your knowledge.

About the job
Lincoln International, Inc. (NYSE: LCLN) is a trusted investment banking advisor to business owners and senior executives of leading private equity firms and their portfolio companies and to public and privately held companies. Our services include mergers and acquisitions advisory, private funds and capital markets advisory, and valuations and fairness opinions. The global enterprise is comprised of a tightly integrated team of more than 1,400 professionals in more than 30 offices in 14 countries, offering an unobstructed perspective on the global private capital markets, backed by superb execution and a deep commitment to client success. With extensive industry knowledge and relationships, timely market intelligence and strategic insights, we forge deep, productive client relationships that endure for decades. Connect with us to learn more at www.lincolninternational.com.

At Lincoln International, we know that the success of our global organization is a direct outcome of the strength of our people. We encourage diversity of thought and create talent density by attracting, retaining and engaging high performers from all demographics, backgrounds and perspectives. We value diversity, equity and inclusion as a catalyst to foster innovation and creative problem solving, access the best candidates and adapt to a highly dynamic, competitive environment. Lincoln International is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. Duties & Responsibilities:

We are looking for an experienced UI/UX Developer with 4–6 years of experience to design and build high-quality, scalable web applications. This role requires a strong combination of frontend engineering expertise and hands-on UX design capability, including wireframing and prototyping, to deliver intuitive, responsive, and visually consistent user experiences.

The ideal candidate will work closely with product, design, backend, and data teams to translate requirements into effective user interfaces, particularly for data-intensive and interactive applications.

Key Responsibilities:

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate product requirements into intuitive and user-friendly interfaces.
Design and develop responsive web applications using modern frontend technologies, primarily React and TypeScript.
Create wireframes, low- to high-fidelity mockups, and interactive prototypes to communicate design ideas effectively.
Contribute to and evolve design systems, including layout patterns, components, and interaction guidelines.
Develop rich, data-driven interfaces such as dashboards, tables, filters, and analytical views.
Integrate frontend applications with backend services via RESTful APIs and manage asynchronous data flows effectively.
Implement efficient client-side state management and application architecture.
Develop seamless navigation and routing across application modules.
Implement data visualization components using appropriate charting and UI libraries.
Ensure secure handling and rendering of dynamic content in the frontend.
Contribute to code quality through clean architecture, code reviews, testing, and adherence to best practices.
Participate in build and deployment processes for frontend applications.
Continuously enhance usability, accessibility, performance, and responsiveness of applications.

Qualifications:

4-6 years of experience in frontend development, with strong expertise in JavaScript and TypeScript.
Proven experience building production-grade applications using React.
Strong understanding of modern frontend architecture, component-based design, and state management patterns.

Hands-on experience with design and prototyping tools such as Figma, Sketch, or Adobe XD.
Experience integrating frontend applications with RESTful APIs.
Experience building interactive, data-rich user interfaces (e.g., tables, dashboards, filters, forms).
Familiarity with modern UI component libraries and styling approaches (e.g., component-based or utility-first CSS frameworks).
Experience with client-side state management solutions (e.g., Redux, Zustand, Recoil, Jotai or similar).
Knowledge of data visualization techniques and commonly used charting libraries.
Understanding of secure frontend practices, including safe handling of dynamic or user-generated content.
Familiarity with modern frontend build tools and development workflows.
Exposure to Azure-based frontend deployment patterns, including Azure Storage static hosting, Azure CDN or Front Door, and Azure DevOps pipelines.
Experience with frontend testing frameworks (unit, integration, and end-to-end testing).
Proficiency with Git-based version control and collaborative development practices.

Educational Qualifications:

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science

About the job
Job Summary

Sr Software Engineer B3 role focuses on designing and building secure scalable and resilient mobile and backend applications using React Native Java and JavaScript within a hybrid work model The role involves collaborating with cross functional teams to deliver high quality features that improve user experience and align with business goals while ensuring maintainable code and continuous improvement across the software lifecycle

Responsibilities

Design and develop scalable React Native mobile applications that deliver a consistent and intuitive user experience across multiple device platforms and screen sizes
Implement robust Java based backend services that ensure secure efficient and reliable processing of business logic and data workflows in alignment with enterprise standards
Build reusable JavaScript components and utilities that improve development efficiency maintainability and consistency across multiple projects and codebases
Collaborate closely with product managers designers and fellow engineers to refine technical requirements clarify use cases and align implementation details with business outcomes
Review and refactor existing code to improve performance reliability and readability while maintaining strict adherence to coding standards and engineering best practices
Integrate mobile and backend systems with internal and external application programming interfaces to ensure accurate secure and efficient data exchange
Develop and maintain automated unit integration and functional tests that increase coverage reduce regressions and support confident delivery of new features
Troubleshoot and resolve complex production issues by analyzing logs telemetry and user feedback to identify root causes and implement sustainable fixes
Optimize application performance by profiling critical paths reducing unnecessary network calls and tuning database and caching strategies for responsive user experiences
Contribute to technical design discussions by proposing pragmatic solutions that balance short term delivery needs with long term system scalability and resilience
Mentor junior engineers by providing constructive feedback pairing on complex tasks and sharing practical guidance on React Native Java and JavaScript engineering practices
Document system architecture key design decisions and operational runbooks in a clear and concise manner to support knowledge sharing and efficient incident response
Collaborate within the hybrid work model by using digital collaboration tools to maintain clear communication alignment and transparency across distributed teams
Drive continuous improvement initiatives by identifying process gaps suggesting automation opportunities and supporting adoption of modern engineering tools and practices
Ensure all deliverables adhere to security compliance and data privacy guidelines to protect users and support the company reputation in global markets

Qualifications

Exhibit strong hands on experience in building and shipping complex React Native applications including state management navigation and offline capabilities
Demonstrate deep proficiency in Java language features object oriented design patterns and development of secure and performant backend services
Apply solid JavaScript fundamentals including asynchronous programming modular architectures and tooling to deliver maintainable and testable code
Utilize practical knowledge of software engineering practices such as version control branching strategies code reviews and continuous integration in daily work
Employ working experience with relational or document databases and query optimization techniques to design efficient and reliable data access layers
Display familiarity with Agile or iterative delivery methods by participating in planning estimation daily discussions and continuous feedback cycles
Leverage exposure to cloud based environments and containerization concepts to support scalable deployment of mobile and backend services even at a foundational level
Value strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in a hybrid setup and engage constructively with peers stakeholders and partner teams

Certifications Required

Oracle Certified Professional Java Programmer or equivalent Java certification preferred React Native or JavaScript framework certification is an advantage

About the job
HackerRank helps companies like NVIDIA, Amazon, and Microsoft hire and upskill the next generation of developers based on skills, not pedigree. Our platform is trusted by over 2,500 of the world’s most innovative companies to build strong engineering teams ready for what’s next.

Software has entered an era where humans and AI build side by side. As this shift accelerates, the definition of strong technical talent is changing. We give companies better ways to identify and invest in next-generation skills.

People at HackerRank care deeply about the impact of their work and sweat the small details so our customers can be wildly successful with products they genuinely love to use. We move with urgency and believe great outcomes come from high standards.

About The Role

As a Senior Developer Relations (DevRel) engineer, you will be responsible for building and scaling a strong developer community around our core products. Your primary focus will be to engage developers, identify and nurture top talent, and create systems that enable the community to contribute high-quality questions at scale.

You will operate at the intersection of community, product, and growth, acting as both a champion for developers and a strategic partner to internal teams. This role is critical to expanding our ecosystem, increasing our talent pool in the network, and ensuring our products are shaped by real-world developer needs and expertise.

What You’ll Do

Build and manage a global network of experts to create coding challenges.
Build, curate, and manage a community-sourced pipeline of high-quality hands-on questions that include problem description, canonical solutions, hints and guidelines for all our core products.
Nurture community participation, support developer success, and measure engagement signals to inform strategy.
Identify, recruit and collaborate with developer champions, contributors, community leaders, and influencers to grow our reach and credibility.

Who You Are

You are a seasoned technical community builder, and developer advocate who blends deep technical credibility with outstanding communication and relationship skills.
Hands-on experience writing code, building sample apps, or shipping technical projects that demonstrate your ability to teach by example.
Strong technical foundation with experience in at least one mainstream programming language and technology stack.
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills. You can explain complex technical problems and solutions in ways that empower developers to succeed.
Genuine passion for developers, deep empathy for their workflows, and a commitment to helping them succeed without resorting to sales pressure.

Even better if you have

Experience contributing to or building for developer ecosystems.
Exposure to open-source communities and technical content development.
Familiarity with AI-driven workflows for scaling product capabilities.

You will thrive in this role if

You’re a builder at heart, excited to create scalable systems from the ground up.
Ambiguity doesn’t slow you down - you bring clarity, structure, and crisp execution.
You care deeply about developer experience, customer impact, and raising the bar in technical hiring.
Collaboration energizes you, whether it’s with engineers, customers, or global experts.

About the Role
We are seeking a Frontend Developer – HTML/CSS to support high-impact AI training and evaluation projects. In this role, you will collaborate with leading AI organizations to improve the quality, accuracy, and usability of AI-generated frontend outputs.
You will work closely with a highly skilled team to evaluate, annotate, and refine AI responses related to frontend structure, styling, layout, and UI best practices. Your contributions will directly influence how state-of-the-art AI models generate clean, accessible, and production-ready frontend code.

Opportunity to work with cutting-edge AI teams and influence how AI generates frontend code.

About the job
Location: Bangalore - Indraprastha, India

Thales is a global technology leader trusted by governments, institutions, and enterprises to tackle their most demanding challenges. From quantum applications and artificial intelligence to cybersecurity and 6G innovation, our solutions empower critical decisions rooted in human intelligence. Operating at the forefront of aerospace and space, cybersecurity and digital identity, we’re driven by a mission to build a future we can all trust.

Present in India since 1953, Thales is headquartered in Noida and has other operational offices and sites spread across Delhi, Gurugram, Bengaluru and Mumbai, among others. Over 2200 employees are working with Thales and its joint ventures in India. Since the beginning, Thales has been playing an essential role in India’s growth story by sharing its technologies and expertise in Defence, Aerospace and Cyber & Digital sectors. Thales has two engineering competence centres in India - one in Noida focused on Cyber & Digital business, while the one in Bengaluru focuses on hardware, software and systems engineering capabilities for both the civil and defence sectors, serving global needs. The Group has also established an MRO (Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul) facility in Gurugram to provide comprehensive avionics maintenance and repair services to Indian airlines and support the growth of the local aviation industry.

Position Summary

The Senior Software Integration Engineer will join our Software organization to develop new features of our next generation InFlight Entertainment and Connectivity (IFEC) product suite.

As a Scrum team member, the Senior Software Integration Engineer must become familiar with system requirements and behavior, modify/ develop software, and write and execute performance test plans. The candidate must also troubleshoot hardware, network, and software issues. This position will require the candidate to interact with other groups in the Engineering department, including fellow software development teams, software architects and integration/validation teams. The Senior Software Integration engineer is responsible for delivering features as part of the software release to the verification/validation teams while meeting schedule milestones and quality objectives.

Essential Functions / Key Areas Of Responsibility

Integrate end-to-end systems to validate software, system and/or third party deliveries
Troubleshoot Android framework services and C++/Java on server side Linux based systems
Define and execute various system and software performance test plans
Drive resolution of software issues found during the software test and integration phase
Propose and deploy improvements on software processes, tools and product to increase efficiency and performance
Develop internal tools or use industry tools to capture and analyze system performance metrics.
Analyze root causes of complex hardware or network Issues.
Monitor Key Performance Indicators on progress and performance. Create reports and lead presentations to management and stakeholders.
Participate in technical discussions and agile ceremonies (daily stand up meetings, sprint retrospectives and sprint planning meetings).
Mentor and train team members on technical concepts and department processes.


Minimum Requirements: Skills, Experience, Education, Technical/Specialized Knowledge, Certifications, Language

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or related field with 5+ years’ experience, or Master’s degree in field with 5 to 9 years of experience
2+ years of knowledge/experience in Linux, Networking, and Scripting
5+ years of Java or C++
Familiar with test principles, including functional testing, performance testing, stress testing, endurance testing, recovery testing, ad hoc testing, etc.
Skilled with performing troubleshooting on software & hardware
Knowledgeable with networking, TCP/IP, VLAN,
Self-motivated, critical thinker with strong technical background
Additional key competencies include decision-making, planning and organizing, problem analysis and problem solving, teamwork and adaptability
Ability to make decisions, solve complex problems and work independently
Ability to communicate with fellow team members and team members from other teams (project managers, testing team and stakeholders)
Written communication skills to clearly summarize technical issues and describe analysis
Data driven, familiar with managing Key Performance Indicators to drive improvements
Background of teaching/mentoring team members


Preferred Qualifications

Experience debugging on Linux and/or Android based systems
Development or testing experience with Bluetooth and/or Wifi devices
Experience in IFE
Experience with test automation design and implementation
Knowledge of Agile and common tools (JIRA, Confluence)
Experience in media streaming (rtsp, hls, dash)
Experience in network protocols (tcp/udp/rtp)

Here, you’ll feel empowered to bring your best self, thrive in a supportive culture, and love the work you do. Join us, and be part of a team reimagining technology to create solutions that truly make a difference – for a safer, greener, and more inclusive world.

About the job
Overview 
We’re building an AI evaluation platform that’s becoming indispensable for AI teams. As a Frontend/SDK Developer Level 6, you’ll help shape both the developer-facing SDKs and the product frontend experiences that power the platform. This role goes beyond frontend implementation. We’re looking for someone who can design and maintain high-quality TypeScript SDKs, developer facing APIs, and reusable frontend systems that other developers will directly interact with and depend on. Your code will be visible to external developers and engineering teams, so usability, maintainability, performance, and API design quality matter deeply. You’ll work across product frontend engineering and SDK/platform development using React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind, and modern frontend tooling.

The role requires strong judgment in frontend architecture, reusable abstractions, integration design, performance optimization, and long-term maintainability. We operate with the intensity and ownership mentality of a bootstrapped startup. That means high autonomy, fast iteration cycles, and team members who are willing to put in extra effort when it counts during critical sprints.

What You’ll Do 

SDK & Developer Platform Engineering
Design and maintain TypeScript SDKs and developer-facing libraries.
Build reusable abstractions, APIs, and frontend utilities that external developers can reliably integrate with.
Design maintainable SDK interfaces with scalability and developer usability in mind.
Contribute to package architecture, frontend platform consistency, and reusable component systems.
Write robust automated tests for SDK reliability and frontend quality.
Contribute to developer experience improvements across tooling, package structure, and integration workflows.

Product Frontend Development
Build and maintain responsive, accessible UI components using React 19 and TypeScript.
Implement user-focused designs using Tailwind CSS.
Contribute to frontend architectural planning to ensure maintainable and scalable solutions.
Apply independent problem-solving to resolve complex UI and integration challenges.
Optimize application performance, accessibility, and responsiveness across devices and browsers.
Handle client-side routing, data fetching, and form logic using TanStack Router, React Query, and React Hook Form.
Integrate frontend systems with backend APIs in collaboration with backend developers.
Participate in code reviews, advocate engineering best practices, and maintain high code quality standards.

Must-Have Skills
6 years of professional software engineering experience in employed roles (independent project work does not count toward experience requirements).
Strong expertise in TypeScript, JavaScript, React.js, HTML, and CSS.
Experience building public SDKs, open-source libraries, or developer-facing APIs.
Strong understanding of package architecture, API design, and reusable frontend abstractions.
Strong testing experience using Jest, React Testing Library, or equivalent frameworks.
Strong React Hooks and component-driven development experience.
Experience with Tailwind CSS.
Exposure to React Query, React Hook Form, and TanStack Router.
Understanding of responsive design principles, accessibility best practices, state management heuristics, and frontend optimization techniques.
Ability to assess architectural trade-offs and contribute to frontend technical design discussions.
Strong Git workflows and code review discipline.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to operate independently.

Bonus Skills
Experience with npm package publishing, semantic versioning, and package lifecycle management.
Strong understanding of API ergonomics and developer experience principles.
Experience optimizing frontend packages for bundle size, performance, and tree-shaking.
Experience writing SDK documentation, integration examples, and developer onboarding material.
Experience with Next.js or similar frameworks Familiarity with data visualization frameworks (ChartJS, D3JS, or similar).
Experience building SDKs or frontend tooling used by external developers at scale.
Familiarity with monorepo tooling and package management systems.

About the job
Life at UiPath

The people at UiPath believe in the transformative power of automation to change how the world works. We’re committed to creating category-leading enterprise software that unleashes that power.

To make that happen, we need people who are curious, self-propelled, generous, and genuine. People who love being part of a fast-moving, fast-thinking growth company. And people who care—about each other, about UiPath, and about our larger purpose.

Could that be you?

About The Role

Join the Vertical Solutions team and build UiPath's most ambitious product - an AI agentic orchestration platform that's been recognized as our Invention of the Year for two consecutive years. As a Senior Software Engineer, you'll be at the forefront of our Act 2 strategy, building the infrastructure that allows enterprises to seamlessly orchestrate AI agents, robots, and human-in-the-loop workflows to achieve critical business outcomes.

You'll be working with Lax and the Maestro backend team to build the core orchestration engine that powers enterprise AI automation. This is a high-visibility, high-impact role on UiPath's biggest strategic bet.

What You'll Do

Build and Scale: Design, develop, and maintain full stack for Vertical Solutions products leveraging AI Coding Assistants.
Hands-On Development: Write production-quality code daily, leveraging AI tools (Claude, GitHub Copilot, etc.) to enhance your development workflow
Prototype and Ship: Take ideas from Prototype to validate with real customers and turn the ones that prove value into production systems.
Measure what matters: Design evaluations, measure quality against real customer data, and understand when metrics mislead. Our systems are often non-deterministic. Responsible shipping means measuring honestly, not chasing vanity numbers.
Customer-Centric Engineering: Deeply understand who will use the features you build and why they need them, translating customer needs into elegant technical solutions
Ensure Reliability: Contribute to building highly scalable, reliable distributed systems that enterprises depend on.

What We're Looking For

Builder mindset — you enjoy turning ideas into working systems and taking ownership from Concept through, Customer impact and Production
Strong full stack knowledge including frontend systems like React and backend systems -Python and/or C# — most Vertical Solutions product development is Python (agents, APIs, ETL), while core platform work includes C#, frontend in React. Willingness to work across both is important.
Experience building production AI systems — LLMs, tool-calling, multi-agent architectures, orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, LangChain, or equivalent), structured outputs, orchestration, and evaluation of model behavior in real-world workflows
Distributed systems experience — designing resilient systems with idempotency, replay ability, state management, and long-running jobs
Strong analytical thinking — able to reason quantitatively about system quality and make sound decisions using imperfect signals
Comfortable with ambiguity and rapid prototyping — able to move from idea to proof-of-concept quickly and iterate based on customer feedback.
Experience with healthcare Tech/ Finance Tech/ Procurement Tech systems experience will be a big plus.

What You'll Bring To The Team

 Bachelor's/Master's degree in Engineering, Computer Science or equivalent experience.
 7+ years of software engineering experience, with 4+ years focused on distributed systems and backend architecture.
 Strong proficiency in one or more system-level languages – Javascript / C# / Java etc
 Full-stack experience: ability to work across backend services and frontend layers (REST/GraphQL APIs, basic UI integration, component contracts).
 Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, architectural design patterns, system design, and data structures & algorithms.
 Experience with React, TypeScript, or other modern frontend frameworks for deeper full-stack contribution.
 Strong grasp of multithreading, asynchronous programming, synchronization, and cloud-native programming models.
 Hands-on experience with cloud ecosystems: Azure, AWS, or GCP.
 Proficiency with containerization and orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, or equivalent.
 Hands-on experience with AI coding tools and coding agents (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, or similar) and a demonstrated ability to integrate these into daily engineering workflows.
 Experience driving team adoption of AI-powered productivity tools – setting norms, measuring impact, and iterating on usage patterns.
 Familiarity with modern engineering practices: agile development, CI/CD, DevOps, and infrastructure as code.
 Excellent verbal and written communication skills; proven success collaborating with globally distributed teams and managing complex, time-bound deliverables.
 Ability to understand, communicate, and drive complex technical decisions with stakeholders at all levels.

Nice to Have

Experience with healthcare Tech/ Finance Tech/ Procurement Tech systems experience will be a big plus.
Data science and evaluation
Experience with applied ML techniques such as classification, anomaly detection, ranking, or predictive modeling
Experience evaluating AI systems using experimentation, metrics, and empirical analysis to improve quality and reliability
Data and retrieval systems
Experience with large-scale data platforms (Snowflake, columnar warehouses, denormalized data models)
Familiarity with retrieval-heavy architectures, RAG systems, or citation-grounded AI workflows
Engineering for trustworthy AI
Experience blending deterministic and probabilistic systems (rules engines + AI)
Experience designing eval-driven systems, regression testing for LLM outputs, or human-in-the-loop review workflows
Platform and product development
 Frontend familiarity (React, TypeScript)
 Workflow orchestration platforms (Temporal, Airflow, Maestro, BPMN, Step Functions)
 Kubernetes and distributed infrastructure
 Experience in startups, applied research, or 0→1 product environments
 Open-source contributions

How We Work

Vertical Solutions operates like an internal startup inside UiPath: small teams, fast iteration, and real customers in the loop. We build quickly, test ideas with users, and turn the best ones into products. Some ideas won’t make it — that’s expected. You’ll work in short cycles, demo frequently, and adapt as we learn. We care more about solving the right problem than protecting a plan that no longer fits. If you enjoy ambiguity, rapid feedback, and building where product boundaries move fast, you’ll likely thrive here.

Why Join Us

Work on cutting-edge AI technology that's shaping the future of enterprise automation
Be part of a team building Times top 100 Invention of the Year (2 years running)
Collaborate with talented engineers who value rapid iteration and customer impact
Contribute to UiPath's Act 2 strategy - our most important product initiative

Maybe you don’t tick all the boxes above—but still think you’d be great for the job? Go ahead, apply anyway. Please. Because we know that experience comes in all shapes and sizes—and passion can’t be learned.

Many of our roles allow for flexibility in when and where work gets done. Depending on the needs of the business and the role, the number of hybrid, office-based, and remote workers will vary from team to team. Applications are assessed on a rolling basis and there is no fixed deadline for this requisition. The application window may change depending on the volume of applications received or may close immediately if a qualified candidate is selected.

We value a range of diverse backgrounds, experiences and ideas. We pride ourselves on our diversity and inclusive workplace that provides equal opportunities to all persons regardless of age, race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, and expression, national origin, disability, neurodiversity, military and/or veteran status, or any other protected classes. Additionally, UiPath provides reasonable accommodations for candidates on request and respects applicants' privacy rights. To review these and other legal disclosures, visit our privacy policy.

About the job
About The Role

What if the code you write could determine how smart the next generation of AI truly is? We're looking for experienced Software Engineers to design and build the coding benchmarks and data pipelines used to evaluate frontier AI models — the systems that decide whether an AI can actually reason, debug, and write production-quality software.

This is high-impact, technically demanding work at the intersection of software engineering and AI research. You'll work with large codebases, multiple programming languages, and scalable infrastructure to create evaluation systems that push the boundaries of what AI can do.

This is a fully remote contract role. If you thrive in fast-paced engineering environments and want your work to directly shape the trajectory of AI — this is the role.

Organization: Alignerr
Type: Hourly Contract
Location: Remote
Contract Length: 3 Months
Commitment: Full-time availability preferred

What You'll Do

Design and implement coding benchmarks used to evaluate frontier AI models across real-world programming tasks
Build and maintain scalable data pipelines for AI evaluation workflows
Analyze AI-generated code for correctness, reliability, and edge-case failures
Create structured evaluation scenarios that rigorously test reasoning, debugging, and code quality
Work with large code repositories and multi-language environments
Collaborate on systems that improve how AI models understand and generate software
Provide detailed technical feedback on model performance and failure patterns
Contribute to the design of evaluation frameworks that set industry standards

Who You Are

Experience working at a high-growth tech company or top-tier software organization
Expert proficiency in Python — you write clean, performant, well-tested Python code
Hands-on experience with code repositories and working in large, complex codebases

Track record of working in high-performance engineering environments with large-scale products or platforms
Strong command of version control systems (Git) and modern development workflows
Bilingual or native English speaker with strong written communication skills

Senior or Lead-level engineering profiles with a history of technical ownership

Experience with CI/CD pipelines and writing robust unit tests (pytest, Mocha, JUnit)
Background in security engineering or significant open-source contributions
Familiarity with AI/ML evaluation methodologies or model benchmarking

Why Join Us

Fully remote — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection

About the job
Job Description

Advanced Systems Engr - Engineering NGA

The Next Generation Avionics (NGA) Engineering organization is looking for a Senior Engineer to join our product development group located in Bangalore, India.

In this role, primary responsibility will be to develop advanced features and functionality for Honeywell’s latest cockpit offering - ANTHEM. The engineer must have good knowledge of engineering fundamentals to complete defined project subtasks.

Responsibilities

Job Expectations:

 Detailed understanding and working experience on Avionics System\software and Certification. 
 Experience in the development of any or multiple Aircraft functions like Displays, Flight Management, Communication & Navigation, Flight Controls, Cybersecurity is required. 
 Analysis of customer and operational requirements to define systems architecture, capture requirements, perform integration/systems/functional testing, and conduct design reviews. 
 Ability to develop, validate and verify system level requirements for flight deck avionic programs. 
 Trouble shoot current systems interfaces and performance problems. 
 Lead or assist in coordinating engineering review activities associated with SRR, PDR and CDR milestones. 
 Able to work with a diverse group of team members who could be geographically distributed. 
 Interfaces with stakeholders outside of their CoE, including Equipment Engineering Teams, Customer Engineering Leads (CEL), SPE, LSE, ASL, other engineering. 
 Good Understanding of Avionics architecture (HW and Systems). 
 Experience with Agile development processes. 
 Knowledge of AGILE tools. IBM Rational DOORS NG Requirements Management tool, Atlassian JIRA Change management tool. 
 Anticipate problems, recognize, and eliminate barriers. 
 Keep management apprised of program status and roadblocks. 
 Manage efforts based on priorities, availability, and commitments. 

Qualifications

Basic Qualifications: 

 Bachelors or Master’s degree in Avionics, Electrical, Electronic or Computer Engineering 
 6 years of combined system/software/hardware product engineering development experience as a technical solution provider and functional discipline leader. 

Additional Qualifications

 Experience with functional decomposition desired. 
 Experience working with customers on Systems requirements required 
 ARP4754 process knowledge strongly preferred. 
 Knowledge about EPIC/APEX platform and applications desired. 
 5+ years of avionics platform system engineering experience highly desirable. 
 Experience on large, complicated programs preferred. 
 3+ years Systems Safety Analysis experience preferred. 
 Academic background in Systems Engineering preferred. 
 Excellent Communication skills. 
 Six Sigma Greenbelt certification desired 
 Avionics background, Knowledge, and experience on ARP4754A, Aero Process is required 
 Positive, can-do attitude. 
 Excellent written and oral communication skills. 
 Ability to work effectively as part of team both locally and globally.

About the job
Forward Deployed Engineer

About The Role

As a Junior Forward Deployed Engineer, you will make an impact by building and deploying real-world Generative AI and agentic solutions directly within client environments. You will be a valued member of the AI engineering team and work collaboratively with client stakeholders, engineers, and architects to turn complex problems into working software—fast.

In This Role, You Will

Embed directly at client sites to prototype and deploy agentic AI workflows using frameworks such as LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, or AWS Bedrock Agents — shipping working code, not slide decks
Build and deploy agentic AI workflows and applications within client environments using modern AI frameworks
Develop end-to-end RAG pipelines, including retrieval optimization, vector databases, and response evaluation
Instrument AI applications with observability and monitoring tools to ensure production readiness
Collaborate closely with client teams through stand-ups, design reviews, and feedback loops
Rapidly prototype and iterate solutions, delivering working demos and production-ready code in short cycles

Work model

At Cognizant, we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible, and we are here to support a healthy work-life balance through our various wellbeing programs. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a Work from Office (In Office) position requiring presence in a client or Cognizant office.

The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting. This may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations.

What You Need To Have To Be Considered

Strong programming skills in Python with working knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript
Experience with REST APIs, Git, CI/CD basics, and containerization (Docker)
Familiarity with SQL and at least one cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Hands-on experience building Generative AI solutions (RAG or agent-based applications)
Understanding of prompt engineering, LLM evaluation, and agentic workflows

These will help you stand out

Experience building and shipping real AI projects (GitHub, hackathons, or production work)
Familiarity with agent frameworks and orchestration concepts (tools, memory, planning loops)
Exposure to LLM observability and evaluation tools
Strong problem-solving mindset with the ability to work in ambiguous, fast-paced environments
Confidence to collaborate with clients and adapt quickly based on feedback

We’re excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don’t hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting perspectives to this role.

About the job
Organization

At CommBank, we never lose sight of the role we play in other people’s financial wellbeing. Our focus is to help people and businesses move forward to progress. To make the right financial decisions and achieve their dreams, targets, and aspirations. Regardless of where you work within our organisation, your initiative, talent, ideas, and energy all contribute to the impact that we can make with our work. Together we can achieve great things.

Job Title: Principal Software Engineer

Location: Bangalore

Business & Team: BB Tech - Payments Technology

Enterprise Services (ES) is responsible for the world leading application of technology and operations across every aspect of CommBank, from innovative product platforms for our customers to essential tools within our business. We also use technology to drive efficient and timely processing, an essential component of great customer service. CommBank is recognized as leading the industry in IT and operations with its world-class platforms and processes, agile IT infrastructure, and innovation in everything from payments to internet banking and mobile apps.

The Payments Technology and Environments team resides in the Payments Service Utility and its purpose is to restore the trust of our customers by transforming the Payments services experiences provided by the Bank to 99.999% availability, greater agility and reliability. Our team is composed of engineers and technology leaders, who bring in the right mix of skills to enable this transformation. We also work very closely with our business and operations colleagues to support these services which are critical to the Australian and Global economy. Our team is also responsible to also drive Engineering Governance, Continuous Delivery and key technological simplification pillars such as Cloud and Payments Event based architecture.

Impact & Contribution

As a Principal Software Engineer within Payments Technology - Batch, you will be responsible for defining the Engineering Strategy for the greenfield development which will be the foundation for future proof Solutions being developed as a part of Service Domain initiative. Specifically, as a Principal Software Engineer, you are expected to develop solutions and guide design to drive outcomes across the Core Product Systems within Realtime Payments. You are responsible for design analysis and the estimation process from Business Case, ideation, discovery and inception phases. You would also be working on some of the legacy technologies (like WebSphere) which are used in some of the applications and plan to maintain and modernize them.

Roles & Responsibilities:

Design and implement BIAN APIs and specifications
Lead high performing API and Cloud Engineering team
Adopt a ‘Design to Run’ mentality to architect robust solutions that are fully supportable in a production environment
Provide developmental advice and consult for business case/ideation, discovery, inception and enhancement requests by examining current vs target architectures ensuring align with ES strategy and architecture standards
Collaborate with Solution Architecture and functional SME’s to prototype solutions to explore alternatives, seeking simple & standard solutions with a low cost of ownership
Collaborate with upstream and downstream system representatives to ensure an integrated end to end solution is delivered to achieve the desired outcomes
Proactively seek opportunities for continuous improvement of Core Product systems and data to leverage existing capabilities
Work with senior technical and business management teams in identifying issues of current state architecture, developing target state architecture with the ability to communicate the features and benefits
Identifies and engages stakeholders, including architecture disciplines, asset owners, delivery owner, business stakeholders and SMEs to ensure architecture is optimal, and has the greatest chance of success
Effectively challenges business leaders to obtain the best technology solutions and fit with ES strategy
Continually learning modern technology best practices and bring them back to the group. Go above and beyond in improving quality and performance in the delivery of efficient, reliable and maintainable application and solutions that meet design and requirements specifications for technology projects.

Essential Skills

14-18 Years of experience in experience in Java/J2EE and Scripting Language (TypeScript/JavaScript/Python)
Experience in AWS services like lambda, API gateway, EKS Cluster, IM Roles & Policy, Bean Stalk, Fargate, VPC, SubNets, Route tables, Load balancer etc.
Experience in CI-CD Tools – Github, Github Action, Sonar Qube/Cloud, Teamcity/Jenkin, Docker, Kubernetes
Monitoring and logging tools – Splunk/ObservInc, AppDynamics, Cloud Watch Canary
Technical leadership of tools and technologies within capability (develop, build, test automation, deployment, monitoring & logging, or service management & orchestration) being specialized
Strong understanding of application architecture and knowledge of software implementation best practices and object orientated design principles
You are able to debug complex technical issues involving multiple system components
Ability to work and participate in an agile (scrum) environment

Education Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree/master’s degree in engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology or any similar stream

If you're already part of the Commonwealth Bank Group (including Bankwest, x15ventures), you'll need to apply through Sidekick to submit a valid application. We’re keen to support you with the next step in your career.

We're aware of some accessibility issues on this site, particularly for screen reader users. We want to make finding your dream job as easy as possible, so if you require additional support please contact HR Direct on 1800 989 696.

Advertising End Date: 29/06/2026

About the job
Senior Associate Developer, Salesforce

Bangalore, Karnataka India

AXA XL are creating a new delivery model based on agile and a new vendor model to enable more efficient delivery of technology with the business fully embedded in what we deliver. This Digital Factory will first deliver new capabilities for Fusion Transformation and then will be rolled out to other capabilities within GT (Global Technology) and IDA (Innovation, Data & Analytics). We are seeking a Senior Salesforce Developer with extensive expertise in automated software testing and a passion for coaching others to join our dynamic team. As a Senior Salesforce Developer, you will play a key role in architecting, designing, and implementing our insurance workbench application on the Salesforce platform, with a focus on test-driven development, automated testing, and continuous integration.

What You’ll Be DOING

What will your essential responsibilities include?

Drive the development and maintenance of our insurance workbench application on the Salesforce platform, leveraging your expertise to design and integrate relevant modules, customizations, and configurations that optimize workflows and data management.
Implement and champion best practices in automated software testing, including Test-Driven Development (TDD) and the use of tools like Selenium. Ensure all developments are thoroughly tested, reliable, and maintainable.
Lead and mentor a team of developers, providing technical guidance, conducting code reviews, and promoting best practices in Salesforce development, automated testing, and software quality assurance.
Build and lead the automated software testing chapter for insurance workbench suite and influencing. 
Lead the development of APIs to facilitate data exchange and connectivity with external systems and partners.
Champion a product-led Agile approach to development, applying design thinking principles to create intuitive user experiences (UX) and customer experiences (CX) within the workbench application.
Drive continuous improvement initiatives, staying ahead of emerging technologies and industry trends, and adapting to changing product requirements.

You will be reporting to Release Train Engineer- Claims.

What You Will BRING

We’re looking for someone who has these abilities and skills:

Required Skills And Abilities

Proven experience as a Senior Salesforce Developer, with a track record of delivering complex solutions in enterprise environments, preferably within the insurance domain.
Extensive experience with automated testing tools such as Selenium, and a deep understanding of test-driven development (TDD) methodologies.
Significant leadership and communication skills, with the ability to effectively guide and collaborate with development squads, stakeholders, and business users.
A deep understanding of Agile principles, with a passion for driving continuous improvement and innovation.
Proficiency in Salesforce development (Apex, Visualforce) and familiarity with cloud-based integration, design thinking, UX/CX, and BPMN.

Desired Skills And Abilities

Outstanding ability to coach and mentor team members, helping them to develop expertise in automated testing and software quality assurance.
Leading a automation testing chapter.
Excellent analytical abilities to identify issues and devise effective solutions in a dynamic environment.
A Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent work experience. 

Who WE are

AXA XL, the P&C and specialty risk division of AXA, is known for solving complex risks. For mid-sized companies, multinationals and even some inspirational individuals we don’t just provide re/insurance, we reinvent it.

How? By combining a comprehensive and efficient capital platform, data-driven insights, leading technology, and the best talent in an agile and inclusive workspace, empowered to deliver top client service across all our lines of business − property, casualty, professional, financial lines and specialty.

With an innovative and flexible approach to risk solutions, we partner with those who move the world forward.

Learn more at axaxl.com

What we OFFER

Inclusion

AXA XL is committed to equal employment opportunity and will consider applicants regardless of gender, sexual orientation, age, ethnicity and origins, marital status, religion, disability, or any other protected characteristic. At AXA XL, we know that an inclusive culture and enables business growth and is critical to our success. That’s why we have made a strategic commitment to attract, develop, advance and retain the most inclusive workforce possible, and create a culture where everyone can bring their full selves to work and reach their highest potential. It’s about helping one another — and our business — to move forward and succeed.

Five Business Resource Groups focused on gender, LGBTQ+, ethnicity and origins, disability and inclusion with 20 Chapters around the globe.
Robust support for Flexible Working Arrangements 
Enhanced family-friendly leave benefits 
Named to the Diversity Best Practices Index 
Signatory to the UK Women in Finance Charter

Learn more at axaxl.com/about-us/inclusion-and-diversity. AXA XL is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Total Rewards

AXA XL’s Reward program is designed to take care of what matters most to you, covering the full picture of your health, wellbeing, lifestyle and financial security. It provides competitive compensation and personalized, inclusive benefits that evolve as you do.

We’re committed to rewarding your contribution for the long term, so you can be your best self today and look forward to the future with confidence.

Sustainability

At AXA XL, Sustainability is integral to our business strategy. In an ever-changing world, AXA XL protects what matters most for our clients and communities. We know that sustainability is at the root of a more resilient future. Our 2023-26 Sustainability strategy, called “Roots of resilience”, focuses on protecting natural ecosystems, addressing climate change, and embedding sustainable practices across our operations.

Our Pillars

Valuing nature: How we impact nature affects how nature impacts us. Resilient ecosystems - the foundation of a sustainable planet and society – are essential to our future. We’re committed to protecting and restoring nature – from mangrove forests to the bees in our backyard – by increasing biodiversity awareness and inspiring clients and colleagues to put nature at the heart of their plans.
Addressing climate change: The effects of a changing climate are far-reaching and significant. Unpredictable weather, increasing temperatures, and rising sea levels cause both social inequalities and environmental disruption. We're building a net zero strategy, developing insurance products and services, and mobilizing to advance thought leadership and investment in societal-led solutions.
Integrating ESG: All companies have a role to play in building a more resilient future. Incorporating ESG considerations into our internal processes and practices builds resilience from the roots of our business. We’re training our colleagues, engaging our external partners, and evolving our sustainability governance and reporting.
AXA Hearts in Action: We have established volunteering and charitable giving programs to help colleagues support causes that matter most to them, known as AXA XL’s “Hearts in Action” programs. These include our Matching Gifts program, Volunteering Leave, and our annual volunteering day – the Global Day of Giving. 

For more information, please see axaxl.com/sustainability.

About Svayou Healthcare:
Svayou Healthcare is a premium healthcare consulting firm dedicated to delivering superior services and solutions. Focused on driving innovation, our organization works across diverse healthcare domains to enhance patient outcomes and operational efficiency. With an emphasis on pediatric healthcare, Svayou Healthcare aims to assist providers in addressing challenges and seizing opportunities within the healthcare industry. This is a part-time, project-based on-site role located in Bangalore Urban for a Pediatric Healthcare Consultant. This role requires a daily commitment of approximately 2 to 3 hours. Both male and female candidates with relevant clinical or healthcare management backgrounds are encouraged to apply. The consultant will provide expert analysis, review pediatric healthcare systems, and ensure operational compliance with industry regulations and Medicare guidelines.
